entry.title: Billing Condition Type to GL Account CDS view for creating custom sales register in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create a custom report for Sales register. Which contains the billing document item details along with the condition type and the GL used to post the condition amount.

I am planning to develop this in the Eclipse.

I have tried to achieve the field by joining multiple CDS view as below. But unable to get the expected result.

I_BillingDocumentItem
I_BillingDocumentItemPrcgElmnt
I_SalesDocument
I_OperationalAcctgDocItem

If anyone from the community please help me to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Document type is auto defaulted after performing an asset transaction before
entry.content: After performing AUC settlement and trying to perform a transfer of asset within company code afterward, the document type is auto defaulted to the previously performed transaction ie AU(AUC settlement). Is there a way to not have this field auto defaulted specific to asset related transactions?

entry.title: Partial payments/invoice for 1 purchased pc
entry.content:
Hi all,

If you have a PO for 1 item, 1 PC to be manufactured, but Sourcing negotiated partial payments according to some milestones (some before receiving that item physically), e.g., 30% upon PO issuance, 30% upon engineering approval, and 40% upon receipt of the material.

How should we proceed in this case? In my opinion, a GR should only be done when the material arrives to the warehouse and therefor just then received in SAP... per my opinion, you shouldn't receive 30% or 40% of what you haven't physically receive... a stock count/control would be having problems too... what about Source to pay here? and what about the controls that indicates to Finance they can pay the negotiated percentage? Finance usually likes to have GR as back up of payments.... how does it work in this regard when if in the PO the "installment" payment terms in the PO is selected? and what is the link in these cases with GR in these cases?
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Cross-Plant Actual Cost Roll-up
entry.content:
We are facing a question regarding GROW standard capabilities and will appreciate your insights.

Business Scenario

  • We have Plant A and Plant B.
  • Plant A manufactures a semifinished product.
  • Plant B procures this semifinished product from Plant A to assemble the Finished Product.

Question

After running CKMLCP, can we achieve a Cross-Plant Actual Cost Roll-up in system?  Can we see cost break down from Plant B?

entry.title: G/L Account Short Description showing On Inputs and Outputs
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In the Transactions are Reports for G/L accounts like ( Manage Journal entries  and Display Line items in General Ledgers )  we found Short Descriptions of Ledger accounts is only showing is there for Input selection and Journal entry display. Is there  any work around to Make those description into long description as a standard to Avoid Collapse of identification between accounts Here i have attached the sample screenshots for your reference Kindly provide a quick solution to meet our requirements

entry.title: Clarification on OAYR posting rule setup.
entry.content:
We are currently in New GL and New Asset Accounting migration Phase 2 testing. We have observed that there are posting rule entries in OAYR for group currency depreciation areas 81 and 49 which are created newly. We never did this setup manually.

Could you please review and confirm why these entries exist and what the functional or accounting impact is?

entry.title: DMEE Intermediary Agent - How to add a City Field
entry.content: Is their a Structure field for City (TwnNm) that can be used in the Intermediary Agent tag (/PstlAdr/TwnNm).  Country has been added and is being pulled from PFAYH BNKS1, but I'm not seeing a field for City.  How are others adding this for the ISO 20022 requirements change?

entry.title: Accumulated values for activation date not allowed in transfer year
entry.content:
Dear team,


While creating a legacy asset in AS91 with the following details:

  • Asset Number: 1200159
  • Company Code: 1301

However, while posting values in ABDLT, we are getting the below error.

We would like to create a legacy sub-asset in AS91. However, the sub-asset option is not appearing on the screen.

Could you please help us understand the reason for this issue and assist us in resolving it?
Also, please guide us on how to create a sub-asset through AS91.

Best regards,
Kishore

entry.title: We are unable to settle the previous year’s AUC asset to the cost center
entry.content:
Dear Team,

It has been identified that the previous year’s AUC asset could not be settled to the designated cost center. The system is displaying the following error messages:

  • "Settlement of old asset data to receiver type CTR not allowed"
  • Message Class: AW
  • Message Number: 607

We have reviewed the SAP Notes (3621822 and 120253) suggested for this issue and followed the recommended steps. However, the same error persists.

Could you please suggest and provide a solution, For your reference, we have attached the relevant screenshot.

entry.title: Bypassing Commitment Item Check for Certain Transactions
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I would like for transactions that are posted through the cash journal FBCJ not to be checked for commitment items for the affected accounts. Currently the system is issuing an error that No commitment item entered in item 00001 1001. The GL accounts to be updated have a commitment item but somehow the error is still persisting. I have also traced the derivation rule, the commitment item is being correctly assigned from GL. However, the error is still being issued.

Please help!

entry.title: Automatic posting of customer receipts - Configure Interpretation Algorithm
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

We have the customer bank details maintained in BUT0BK. I am trying to use this information to automatically select accounts for customer receipts.  For this purpose, I have created a search string to read IBAN from the statement and return the account number.  which is working fine in the simulation, but not reading from the bank statement.  I am trying to get the 8 digit account number from the bank statement and use it to identify customers based on the 8 digit account number stored in BUT0BK. 

1. Search string setup

2. Simulation result.

3. Screenshot of CAMT file line item

 

4. Search string use settings

5. Snip from BUT0BK

Any help on this will be highly appreciated.

Thanks
Faraz

entry.title: AFAB was locked because an asset was in use. How to unlock it for the next AFAB run ?.
entry.content: We have run AFAB at 6 PM yesterday but the program ran empty because one asset was in use.  What do we need to do to unlock AFAB again to allow a new run ?

entry.title: FWTR056 Error During NDF Transaction Creation in FTR_CREATE
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are encountering error FWTR056 while attempting to create an NDF transaction using transaction FTR_CREATE.

 

We have performed a detailed review of the configuration, including product type, transaction type, and all relevant customizing settings, and no inconsistencies were identified.

 

The issue occurs consistently during transaction creation.

 

For your analysis, we have attached:

• A detailed step-by-step document outlining how the error is reproduced

• Screenshots and configuration details related to the product and transaction setup

 

At this point, we suspect there may be a missing dependency, configuration inconsistency not visible at first level, or a system-related issue.

 

Could you please assist us in identifying the root cause of error FWTR056 and advise on the appropriate resolution?

 

If additional information is required, we will be happy to provide it.

 

Thank you for your support.

 

Best regards,


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: None of these


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need All Characters in Uppercase in DMEE Payment File (PAYM – /ZGA_CGI_XML_CT_CITI)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We require all alphanumeric characters in the payment file to appear in capital letters, as highlighted in the attached example.

We attempted to achieve this using the conversion function CLU in the DMEE tree, however, the system is generating an incorrect payment file after applying this function.

Request your guidance on how we can correctly convert the values to uppercase within the DMEE format tree:

  • Tree Type: PAYM
  • Format Tree: /ZGA_CGI_XML_CT_CITI

Could you please advise which conversion function is required.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Regards,
Gokul Sawant

entry.title: Asset Report not executed in ECC
entry.content: When running the asset reports in the system, an error message appears stating ‘Fiscal year change has not yet been made for company code XXX,’ even though the fiscal year is open for the asset period in OAAQ (1+2). The detailed screenshots are attached herewith for your reference. Kindly advise on how this issue can be resolved.

entry.title: F17P cannot consolidate balance reports across multiple company codes (Ford Blue, Pro, and Model-e).
entry.content:
Currently, Ford utilizes three distinct company codes to represent its business segments: Ford Blue, Ford Pro, and Ford Model-e. Many customers conduct business across all three segments simultaneously.

When the Balance Confirmation process is executed using T-code F17P specifically for Poland and CZECH, the system generates individual reports restricted to a single company code. This results in fragmented reporting for a single customer entity. There is a business requirement to provide these customers with a single, unified balance confirmation statement that aggregates their financial position across all relevant Ford company codes, rather than receiving three separate documents.

Solution Needed Expert guidance is requested from the SAP support teams on the following:

  1. Standard SAP Functionality: Is there a standard configuration or parameter within F17P (or related programs like RFKORB00/RFDORB00) that allows  to generate consolidated report for multiple company code for a single customer?
  2. BTE (Business Transaction Events): Can a specific BTE (such as those in the 1310 or 1320 se

entry.title: SAP ECC 6.0 – Fiscal Year Variant Change ( 5-4-4 → Calendar Month)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently reviewing a Fiscal Year Variant (FYV) change in SAP ECC 6.0 and would appreciate guidance from who have handled similar scenarios.

Current Situation

  • Financial year: 1 July → 30 June
  • Existing FY variant is year‑dependent
  • Period 12 ends on 26 June, not 30 June (as per 5-4-4 method)
  • Dates 27–30 June are posted to next financial year (Period 1)
  • This early‑close model was historically implemented (likely for operational / RE‑FX reasons)
  • The setup is used across FI, Asset Accounting, MM, SD, RE‑FX, CO, BW, payroll posting, and custom jobs

New Business Requirement

Business is planning an SAP ECC → SAP S/4HANA conversion. Therefore, business want to align its fiscal calendar to calendar month end periods prior to S/4HANA migration. (from 5-4-4 to Calendar month)

(27–30 June 2026 must remain in the current FY, not roll into the next one)

From our understanding, this cannot be achieved without changing fiscal period boundaries in OB29.

Questions to the Community

  1. In SAP ECC 6.0, how risky is it in practice to modify an existing year‑dependent FY variant with historical postings?
  2. Has anyone successfully modified an existing FY variant (instead of creating a new one) without later issues?
  3. Are there any SAP‑supported alternatives to include 27–30 June in the same FY without redefining the FYV?
  4. From an audit/governance perspective, which approach have you found easier to defend?
  5. Any specific Asset Accounting, BW or RE‑FX pitfalls we should be aware of?

We are looking for real‑world ECC experience, not just OB29 theory.

Any guidance, lessons learned, or relevant SAP Notes would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Account Determination MM - How to deactivate rules
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have noticed that on S4/HANA Public Cloud it doesn't seem to be possible to deactivate rules in MM account determination once they have been activated:

System does not allow to deselect these checkboxes although valuation class entries have not been maintained. Is there a way to deactivate these rules? If not, this would mean that you need to maintain account determination for all valuation classes in this example. 

Thanks for your input in advance and best regards,

Max

entry.title: Event-Based Revenue Recognition - How to consider tax (VAT)? (Scope Item 3M3)
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are on S/4HANA Public cloud and with regard to EBRR for Service documents (service contracts and service orders), we are using revenue recognition key CCOCF and CCS.

In case we have costs on a service order and revnues have not been billed, system creates a accrual posting for not-billed revenues which leads to realization of revenue in same period like costs were posted. I would have expected that there should be also a posting which considering tax (VAT) but this is not happening. Tax posting is happening when invoice is issued to the customer. But from our point of view taxes need to be posted as soon as revenue is realized. Is this a standard behaviour of the system or are there missing settings in configuration? if this is standard system behaviour, are there any workarounds how this can be solved? Would be great if someone can give some insights.

Thanks a lot for your input and best regards,

Max

entry.title: Deactive / sell / scrap assets in company codes closed for a long time
entry.content:
We want to delete all assets belong to companies had been sold/closed for a long time. Posting period are all closed for these companies. We tried tcodes ABAVN ABAON F-92 to remove these assets but they tried to create posting and all require company period open. Asset cannot be deleted once transaction exists either. Is there a way to scrap or delete them without any new posting? We just want to delete them from database so to clear FI_DOCUMNT errors and compress ACDOCA.

I also archived some assets. Even DELETION step is run, assets still in ANLA table. How do we delete these assets without creating any posting?

Thanks, Colin
